text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time for training and Gold Ship is nowhere to
be found. I search for her around the academy
and come across a strange scene.

text_block_list.name: Tree Fairy (?)
text_block_list.text:
Yup, there you go! ☆ Make sure to swing your
arms if you want to get faster! ☆

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Thanks a bunch for the advice, Miss Fairy! I'll try
my very best!

text_block_list.name: Tree Fairy (?)
text_block_list.text:
Yup! All you can do is try, try, and try again! I'm
rooting for you! Teehee! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship suddenly jumps down from a tree and
lands before me.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: What're you doing all the way out here?
choice_data_list: I should be asking you that question.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Me? I'm being a fairy. What about you?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh, shoot! Today's a training day, isn't it? Ahaha,
I totally forgot!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Big soz, Trainer! Think you can let me slide just
this once?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I let her off easy but warn her not to let it happen
again.
